display_name: Community Coffee Coffee & Chicory Ground Coffee, Medium Roast, 32 Ounce (Pack of 2)
display_text: Born in New Orleans and raised on four generations of coffee expertise, our version of this Southern favorite combines rich, roasted Arabica coffee beans with high-quality chicory for a bolder, sweeter flavor than coffee alone. We recommend trying it café au lait style with steamed milk for a more traditional flavor. Enjoy 64 ounces (approx 230 six-ounce cups of coffee.) Enjoy the taste of our Coffee and Chicory medium dark roast (full body, medium brightness, rich and flavorful taste.) Perfect coffe and dessert pairings: enjoy Coffee and Chicory blend with your chocolate desserts as well as complex multi-flavored desserts. Coffee and Chicory blend also available in ground 12 ounce bag, 16 ounce (1 pound) bag, 23 ounce bag, 36 count and 72 count box single serve coffee pods (compatible with Keurig KCup brewers). You may also enjoy medium dark roast coffees Cafe Special Blend, House Blend, and other medium dark roasts from our gourmet coffee line: Private Reserve Founders Blend, and Private Reserve Evangeline Blend. The roast refers to the temperature which the coffee bean was roasted. The roast determines the flavor of the coffee. Light roasts are described as 'sweet' or 'well-balanced', while dark roasts are intense and lively. The body is the weight of the cofee on the tongue. It’s described as 'syrupy', 'heavy' or 'buttery'. The brightness (acidity) refers to the tangy quality, liveliness or bright note that highlights the flavor of the coffee. Acidity is felt on the sides and back of the tongue. High acidity is described as 'winey', 'bright', 'lively', 'sharp', or 'tangy'.

Product Description

Start your day off right with Tony the Tiger and Kellogg's Frosted Flakes, a delicious cereal that helps you let your GR-R-REAT out with every crunchy spoonful. These on-the-go breakfast cups provide a good source of eight vitamins and minerals to help energize your morning. Not just for breakfast, you can have Kellogg's Frosted Flakes on hand any time of day. Enjoy as a snack at the office, take as an afternoon pick-me-up; reenergize with a post-workout treat, and indulge in a late-night bowlful of sweet, crunchy cereal. Kellogg's Frosted Flakes also makes a great addition to your favorite yogurt and or as the base for a homemade trail mix, the mouthwatering options are endless. Just add your favorite dairy or nut-milk or enjoy as a crispy treat straight from the cup.

Start off your day with a breakfast kids of all ages will love. Each bite of Kellogg's Frosted Flakes Cereal delivers a crunchy and satisfying spoonful of sugar sweetened, corn cereal enriched with 10 essential vitamins and minerals, to get your family's day off to a fun start.

The Benefits of Breakfast: A Healthy Way to Begin the Day

Starting the day with a balanced, great-tasting breakfast can put you on the fast track to good nutrition and better overall health. While many kids and adults forget this important first meal, research has shown that sitting down for a nutritious breakfast can decrease the risk of obesity, heart disease, and other nutritionally related conditions in kids and adults. display_name: Pearl River Bridge Mushroom Flavored Superior Dark Soy Sauce, Plastic Bottles, 16.9 oz.
display_text: Pearl river bridge mushroom flavored superior dark soy sauce comes from the later batches of soy sauce procured during the last stages of the brewing process. The pearl river bridge open-air, sunlit fermentation method provides exceptional flavor, color and consistency. Use in stir-fry both in the wok and poured over finished dishes, or as you would as a condiment or dipping sauce. Also works great as a marinade. Note: "dark" soy sauce denotes its color, not its salt content. Chinese chefs commonly choose "light" or "dark" soy sauce depending on the amount of color they want the sauce to impart on the dish.

display_name: Costa Farms Peace Lily Live Plant, Live Indoor Houseplant Potted in Happy Birthday Gift Wrap Planter, Potting Soil Mix, Birthday Gift Idea for Mom, Dad, Son, Daughter, Friend, 15-Inches Tall
display_text: Enjoy the beauty of Peace Lily, which features solid, green foliage and is fantastic for tabletops. Grow Peace Lily in bright, indirect sunlight. Water it about once a week with approximately 1 cup. Ensure excess water drains. Adjust as needed for your environment. Never let Peace Lily sit in water or saturated soil. When shipped, it’s about 15-inches tall, measured from the bottom of the pot to the top of the plant. Peace Lily ships in a red, 6-inch décor pot. To help with water drainage, this container does have holes.Peace Lily is generally a moderate grower, depending on environment and care provided. Boost growth in spring and summer with a fertilizer labeled for potted plants following the product’s instructions. When Peace Lily outgrows its current container, repot by gently removing it from its container and placing it in a 2-inch wider container. Fill with potting mix and water thoroughly. Hardy outdoors in USDA Zones 10b-11. Exposure to the sap of this plant may cause discomfort to individuals with a sensitivity to it upon contact. Grown for ornamental purposes and not intended for human or animal consumption. Send us your feedback at questions@costafarms.

THE REAL DEAL: If you haven’t tried Zen Monkey or made overnight oats yourself, then you HAVE NOT tried overnight oats. We are the only company that makes overnight oats the way you would at home. The oats are never cooked, they’re just soaked overnight in our blend of juice and yogurt. No HPP or other shortcuts either. Hands down the best product out there.

TASTE, TASTE, TASTE: Our first and most important priority is taste. Zen Monkey is DELICIOUS. Sure, it’s good for you and has whole grains, fruit, protein from the yogurt, and all that good stuff. But our main selling point is HOW GOOD IT TASTES.. Kids LOVE it and kids don’t care about anything but taste!

display_name: Stur Drinks - Tropical Punch, Natural Powder Drink Mix, 42 Sticks, Makes 84 Servings, Made with Organic Cane Sugar, Stevia, and Natural Flavors, Contains High Antioxidant Vitamin C
display_text: Available in numerous delicious flavors, Stur ORGANIC/ ALL-NATURAL drink mixes are for those who want to drink more water naturally! We only use the best natural fruit and stevia leaf extracts, along with Vitamin C. Our powdered drink mixes contain some organic cane sugar in addition to stevia. Stur was born while my wife was pregnant with our twin girls. The doctor had recommended she drink 8-10 glasses of water a day. But like most Americans, she wasn't drinking even half of that! So I started looking for healthy ways to flavor her water. I went to the store and searched the drink mixes, but found that they were all made with artificial chemicals that we didn't feel comfortable putting in my wife's body. Finally I asked a food scientist friend to help me create a blend of natural fruit flavors and natural stevia leaf extract to squeeze in water. It took us over a year and hundreds of different formulations to land upon a blend that tasted truly delicious (and we're still listening to feedback and tinkering to perfect it)! I called our special blend "Stur" and proudly wrote on our hand-drawn label that it had essential vitamins, and NO artificial sweeteners, colors or flavors. (That initial label was hand-drawn by yours truly, and by popular demand, it has since been replaced with a more professional one!). Just like so many others, I hope you love Stur as much as we have put love into making it. If for any reason you aren't satisfied, just let us know --- we will make it right.

Today, there are so many more ways to enjoy the great taste of Canada Dry. Made with only the highest quality ingredients, you can enjoy the refreshing taste of Canada Dry Sparkling Seltzer Water in Original, Lemon Lime, Mandarin Orange, and Raspberry flavors. This crisp, bubbly seltzer water gives you the benefits of hydration that you would get from regular water with the taste of sparkling seltzer water. display_text:
USimplySeason Vadouvan curry seasoning mix of east meets west is inspired by the french curry originating from the region in India with a high concentration of French immigrants. This delicious spice blend is used to make a paste that is used as a base for sauces and soups. USimplySeason Vadouvan curry spice seasoning blend mix will make it a breeze for you to whip up authentic French curries that will have your guests begging for seconds.

And you can make so much more than curries with this spice blend! You'll love the complex and aromatic flavors this spice lends to lamb, game, and poultry when used as a rub or marinade. Or, take your soups, broths, and stews to the next level by adding a dash of Vadouvan while they are simmering.

Snacks - Add an exciting and unexpected pinch to popcorn for a red carpet-worthy treat.

Made from no-salt vegan non-GMO 100% all-natural and organic ingredients with no added additive or preservatives - makes it easy to add this naturally gluten-free exotic flavor when following most diet - paleo, keto or salt-free.

display_name: Callebaut Dark Callets 70.4 % (2 lb)
display_text: For your convenience, Olivenation re-packaged this item from a larger size Callebaut Bittersweet chocolate couverture into this 2 lb bag. Therefore, the item does not arrive in the manufacturers original packaging. Due to the nature of this product, the chocolate may melt during shipping. This does not ruin the chocolate; the chocolate is perfectly fine. Callebauts 70-30-38NV contains 70% cocoa. Ranked with a fluidity level of 3 (out of 5), this is an excellent general-purpose chocolate. This bittersweet chocolate couverture is excellent for enrobing cakes with a thick layer of chocolate, preparing dense chocolate fillings and ganache, and for piping chocolate decorations. These callets are round drops of pure chocolate, easy to melt or temper, weigh, and store, and great for recipes calling for chunks of chocolate. The callets are made using 100% pure cocoa butter and a dash of vanilla that rounds off the taste with a slight sweet hint. Pure chocolate requires tempering to obtain a high gloss for chocolate making. Occasionally there may be light-coloured streaks or film on the surface of the chocolate. This occurs naturally and is a characteristic of pure chocolate. It will disappear when the chocolate is re-melted. Product of Belgium Ingredients: 70% cocoa solids

display_name: Talenti Gelato For a Delicious Frozen Dessert Mediterranean Mint Made with Ingredients 1 pint
display_text: If you’re looking for delicious, you’ve found the perfect frozen dessert. Talenti Mediterranean Mint gelato is the Talenti take on the classic mint chocolate chip ice cream flavor. For this iconic recipe, we steep real mint leaves for 45 full minutes in fresh milk, cream, and sugar to create a smooth gelato with the perfect mint taste. Then, we mix in flecks of semisweet chocolate chips throughout the pint and a unique twist of anise to amplify that mint chocolate taste. At Talenti, we believe the best process and ingredients result in delicious gelato and sorbetto. That’s why we source the highest-quality ingredients from all around the world. Then, we package our products in clear, BPA-free jars that can be recycled and reused any way you like. Please note that Talenti jars are not microwave or dishwasher safe. (For clever reuse ideas, check out #Pintcycling on Instagram). In addition to Talenti Gelato, Talenti has Dairy-Free Sorbettos, Organic Gelato and Gelato Layers -- 5 layers of the ultimate indulgence. All our products are made with non-GMO sourced ingredients which have been evaluated by Where Food Comes From, Inc., and adhere to our Non-GMO Sourced Standards.

display_name: Bear Creek Hearty Soup Bowl, Cheddar Potato, 1.9 Ounce (Pack of 6)
display_text: Bear Creek Country Kitchen soups are full of hearty goodness. They are quick and easy to make and come in 15 delicious varieties. A homemade taste that will satisfy every appetite. High in the Heber Valley of the Wasatch Mountains, Bear Creek began in some pretty simple country kitchens, using homemade recipes and only the finest ingredients to create hearty soups and dishes that won raves. Soon folks wanted to be able to purchase these dry mixes at their local stores. As word of mouth spread, people from far and wide couldn’t get enough of these great tasting recipes. Today, Bear Creek continues the tradition of delivering delicious, satisfying soups just like mom used to make. We still use only the highest quality ingredients and our own special blend of spices. display_name: The Spice Lab Belgian Rock Sugar – 2 Pounds - Natural REAL Beet Sugar - Brown Rock Sugar - Teavana Style Tea Sugar - Perfect Sugar Cube or Amber Sugar Replacement - Natural Rock Sugar for Tea
display_text:
GENUINE BELGIAN BROWN ROCK SUGAR CRYSTALS are a large, faceted form of sweet, crystalline sucrose, most often used as an additive to foods for texture or as a garnish for added visual interest. This sugar has a distinct translucent brown color, due to the natural presence of molasses.

FLAVOR: Less processed than common white or amber rock sugar, Belgian brown rock sugar has a rich, sweet, slightly smoky flavor. This is due to the presence of molasses. This sugar gives drinks and dishes a delicious, multi-dimensional sweet taste.

PERFECT TOUCH: Enhance beverages such as coffee or tea with the same sugar sold by Teavana tea shops before closing. This beet sugar is also commonly used for candy, cupcakes, desserts, or added to sweeten any main dish.

PREMIUM QUALITY: Belgian brown rock sugar has no added color, unlike amber rock sugar which is made with refined white sugar and caramel coloring. Made in the USA, using premium quality ingredients, this Belgian rock sugar is all-natural, gluten-free, kosher and non-GMO.

HOMEMADE BEER: This Belgian brown sugar can also be used as a fermentable sugar for beer making, just mix 225-263 Lovibond (600-700 EBC) - 1 Lb Sugar in 1 gal of water to produce a solution with the specific gravity of 1.045.

display_text: Medjool dates have been considered a delicacy for thousands of years. Their exceptional nutritional value as well as their delightfully sweet flavor earned them a place at the tables of kings. Today dates are not the luxury food they used to be, so everyone can enjoy the benefits they offer. These fruits are delicious, sweet, free of “bad” fats, and give you a boost of energy. Medjool dates contain 50% more potassium than bananas. Organic Medjool dates make a great standalone snack, and they can also be used in a variety of recipes. They go especially well with granolas, candy, biscuits, and salads. You can also add them to special cereal dishes, like couscous or wild rice casserole. Adding some dates to sweeten your protein shake can improve its taste as well as boost its nutritional value.

display_name: TEMPESTA Guanciale Uncured Jowel, 1 LB
display_text: Guanciale is the fatty cut from the sides of the pig’s head called jowl. Though many consider it interchangeable with belly meat, the jowl has unique qualities that make it as suitable eaten thin sliced and out of hand, as well as used to start a pan sauce or soup. Because the pig is chewing all day long, the muscle is worked more than the belly. This means that it has more active fibers, giving it lots more flavor. Due to the berkshire’s ability to store fat with its lean muscle, the guanciale will melt in your mouth if eaten out of hand. For the same reason it is superior to any pancetta in rendering for a dish because the fat within those meat fibers, not found in belly meat, will also break down. In the finished dish, this means there will be fewer hard, dessicated lean bits of meat. Instead, each taste of guanciale will yield to the chew, and again release more flavor with every bite. That is why guanciale is the preferred salumi for use in dishes like pasta all’ amatriciana, carbonara, and gricia. NDUJA ARTISANS SALUMERIA Made with hertitage Berkshire and Duroc pork jowl spiced with fresh herbs, Tellicherry pepper, garlic, fennel pollen, and a pinch of Calabrian pepper. An NA best seller! No nitrites or nitrates added except those naturally occurring in sea salt and celery powder. Made with Heritage pigs raised on family farms without antibioticsor hormones, ever. Always vegetarian-fed.

display_name: Almond Kringle
display_text:
Almond Kringle by O&H Danish Bakery

Our traditional Danish Almond Kringle is one of our best-loved pastries. The exceptionally flavorful and smooth taste make this a favorite since our grandparents started making these special Danish treats over 60 years ago.

Serving Instructions:

Kringle is best served at room temperature or warmed in the oven. Remove the Kringle from the wax bag, remove plastic sheet and remove from plastic tray. If a warm Kringle is desired, place in a 350 degree oven for 3 1/2 minutes. Kringle can also be warmed in a microwave. When ready to serve, cut Kringle into 1 or 2 inch slices. Then watch for approving looks and gestures. For storage, Kringle freezes well. To thaw, let stand for 6 hours in room temperature or 12 hours in a refrigerator.

Shelf Life

Kringle stay fresh for a long time. We recommend 7 days at room temperature, 10 days in the refrigerator and up to 6 months in the freezer. They freeze very well right inside the wax bag they come in.

display_name: Millie's Vegetable Sipping Broth 3 Flavor Assortment, 27 Count
display_text:
Product Description

This premium, savory hot beverage is made from the highest quality vegan, organic, natural and gluten-free ingredients. It really is Comfort Food in a Broth that will keep you satisfied. Our savory, hot snack beverage was inspired by a school teacher (co-founder Lori) who had a desire for a healthy, convenient low calorie snack that she could make quickly between classes. The result is Millie's Sipping Broth – in a ready-to-serve and convenient Steepable broth bag. Each serving is less than 20 calories and has the right amount of satisfying flavor made from a carefully blended mixture of all natural vegetables, herbs, green tea and spices. Add one tea bag to a cup of hot water, steep for two minutes, then stir and enjoy.

From the Manufacturer

$1,232 raised with 36 backers.

Need a smarter snack?

Satisfy your snack time with a savory cup of Millie's Vegetable Sipping Broth. Our gluten free and all vegetable product is made using the highest quality organic and all natural ingredients.

Treat Yourself to Comfort Food in a Broth

Millie's Vegetable Sipping Broth is a single serving Steepable that was created by a school teacher who needed a snack between classes and flavors inspired by her mom Millie. This first-of-its-kind savory hot beverage delivers an amazing taste using the highest quality vegan, natural, wild harvest, organic and gluten-free ingredients. It really is Comfort Food in a Broth.

About Millie's

Millie’s was created by a husband and wife team LLance Kezner and Lori Peha Kezner, who have the distinction of creating the first condiment to ever win outstanding product of the year at the Fancy Food Show in New York. The original recipe for Millie's Sipping Broth was influenced by Lori's mother Millie Peha, who made a mean broth for her matzah ball soup. Our lower sodium, gluten free, and vegan product is created with a unique patent-pending process that infuses a combination of all natural ingredients, organic vegetables, wild harvest herbs, spices and a touch of loose leaf green tea. The product is made in industry leading and USDA organic certified facilities, packed and delivered from the Pacific Northwest.

About the Creators

Creator Q & A

Describe your product in 3 words.

Easy Comfort Food

Where did you get the inspiration for your product?

Millie's was created by a school teacher who needed a snack between classes and flavors inspired by her mom Millie.

What differentiates your product from similar products out there?

The difference is that our product is perfectly seasoned so the savory flavors rise to the surface with each taste.

Tell us about the best and most challenging parts of the creation process.

The challenging parts were creating the initial recipe, which took over a year to create, then the manufacturing process of combining the different weights and densities of the ingredients took another year to perfect. The best part of creating this product is the calls and emails we get every day telling us that our product helps them get between meals with a healthy alternative to sweetened or highly caffeinated hot drinks.
